import normflows as nf; ch,hid,L,K,H=3,64,2,4,16; q0=[];fl=[];mg=[] 
 for i in range(L): 
   fl_=[nf.flows.GlowBlock(ch*2**(L+1-i),hid,split_mode='channel',scale=True) for _ in range(K)]+[nf.flows.Squeeze()] 
   fl+=[fl_] 
   if i>0: mg+=[nf.flows.Merge()] 
   ls=(ch*2**(L-i),H//2**(L-i),H//2**(L-i)) if i>0 else (ch*2**(L+1),H//2**L,H//2**L) 
   q0+=[nf.distributions.ClassCondDiagGaussian(ls,10)] 
 m=nf.MultiscaleFlow(q0,fl,mg)

column3: EAST(backbone='resnet')  # FCN -> per-pixel text-score + rotated-box geometry maps
column9: Zhou et al. 2017 (EAST: Efficient and Accurate Scene Text detector). Single-shot FCN text detector (score map + RBOX/QUAD geometry). Self-contained recipe.

column3: DBNet(backbone='resnet18')  # FPN -> probability map + threshold map -> differentiable binarization
column9: Liao et al. 2020 (Differentiable Binarization). SOTA-era text detector (learned adaptive binarization). Used in PaddleOCR/MMOCR. Self-contained recipe.

column3: CRAFT()  # VGG16-BN UNet-style -> per-char region + affinity score maps
column9: Baek et al. 2019 (Character Region Awareness for Text detection). Char-region + affinity heatmaps; robust to curved text. Self-contained recipe (VGG-UNet).

column3: SATRN(imgH=32, nclass=40)  # shallow CNN + Transformer encoder/decoder for text recognition
column9: Lee et al. 2020 (Self-Attention Text Recognition Network). Transformer-based scene-text recognizer w/ 2D adaptive positional encoding. Self-contained recipe.

column3: LayoutLM(vocab=30522, hidden=768, max_2d_pos=1024)  # BERT + 2D bbox positional embeddings (text+layout)
column9: Xu et al. 2020 (LayoutLM). Document understanding: BERT augmented w/ 2D spatial (bbox) embeddings. Inputs (token ids, bbox coords). Self-contained recipe (extends torch transformer encoder).

column3: OpenPose(stages=6)  # VGG19 feat -> iterative refine: PAF (part-affinity-field) + confidence-map branches
column9: Cao et al. 2017 (Realtime Multi-Person 2D Pose, OpenPose). Bottom-up: part-affinity fields + keypoint heatmaps, multi-stage refinement. Self-contained recipe.

column3: PoseResNet(backbone='resnet50', deconv=3, njoints=17)  # ResNet + 3 deconv layers -> 17-joint heatmaps
column9: Xiao/Wu/Wei 2018 (Simple Baselines for Human Pose Estimation). ResNet + transposed-conv heatmap head. Top-down (cropped person). 17 COCO keypoints. Self-contained recipe; ref: microsoft/human-pose-estimation.pytorch.

column3: PoseHRNet(width=32, njoints=17)  # multi-resolution parallel branches w/ repeated fusion -> heatmaps
column9: Sun et al. 2019 (Deep High-Resolution Representation Learning, HRNet). Maintains high-res throughout via parallel multi-res branches + fusion. 17-joint heatmap output. Self-contained recipe; ref: HRNet-Human-Pose-Estimation.

column3: FastPose(backbone='resnet50', njoints=17)  # SE-ResNet + DUC upsampling -> heatmaps (regional multi-person)
column9: Fang et al. 2017 (RMPE/AlphaPose). Regional multi-person pose (symmetric STN + parametric pose-NMS); FastPose backbone. Self-contained recipe.

column3: StackedHourglass(stacks=8, njoints=16)  # repeated symmetric down/up encoder-decoder hourglasses
column9: Newell/Yang/Deng 2016 (Stacked Hourglass Networks). Iconic symmetric encoder-decoder w/ intermediate supervision; MPII 16 joints. Self-contained recipe.

column3: DeepPose(backbone='alexnet', njoints=16)  # CNN -> FC direct (x,y) joint coordinate regression
column9: Toshev & Szegedy 2014 (DeepPose). First deep pose net: holistic CNN regressing joint coordinates directly (pre-heatmap era). Self-contained recipe.

column3: OSNet(num_classes=1000, feat_dim=512)  # omni-scale lightweight conv (multi-stream + aggregation gate)
column9: Zhou et al. 2019 (Omni-Scale Network for person ReID). Lightweight omni-scale feature learning; standard ReID backbone. Cropped person (256x128). Self-contained recipe; ref: KaiyangZhou/deep-person-reid.

column3: PCB(backbone='resnet50', parts=6)  # ResNet -> 6 horizontal part stripes -> per-part classifiers
column9: Sun et al. 2018 (Part-based Convolutional Baseline, PCB). Horizontal stripe part-level ReID features. Self-contained recipe.
Wang et al. 2018 (Multiple Granularity Network). Combines global + multi-stripe local ReID features. Self-contained recipe.

column3: DeepSORTFeatureNet(feat_dim=128)  # small conv appearance embedder for SORT association
column9: Wojke et al. 2017 (DeepSORT). The appearance feature extractor (wide-residual) feeding SORT's cascade association. Self-contained recipe (the deep-appearance net only).

column3: FairMOT(backbone='dla34')  # DLA-34 + CenterNet heads (heatmap/wh/offset) + parallel 128-d ReID head
column9: Zhang et al. 2020 (FairMOT). Joint detection+ReID (anchor-free CenterNet base + balanced ReID branch). Self-contained recipe (DLA-34 stub + heads).

column3: CenterTrack(backbone='dla34')  # CenterNet + prior-frame heatmap input + tracking-offset head
column9: Zhou/Koltun/Krahenbuhl 2020 (Tracking Objects as Points). Detection-by-tracking: current+prior frame + prior heatmap -> offset. Self-contained recipe.

column3: JDE(backbone='darknet53')  # YOLOv3-style detector + jointly-learned embedding head
column9: Wang et al. 2020 (Towards Real-Time MOT / JDE). Joint Detection and Embedding (shared YOLOv3 + ReID branch). Self-contained recipe.

column3: DARTSNetwork(C=16, layers=8, primitives=8, search=True)  # mixed-op DAG cells (alpha-weighted op mixture), normal+reduction
column9: Liu/Simonyan/Yang 2018 (DARTS). Differentiable NAS supernet (continuous op-mixture over cell DAG). Search proxy: 8 cells/C=16. Self-contained recipe; ref: khanrc/pt.darts.

column3: DARTSNetwork(C=36, layers=20, genotype=DARTS_V2, search=False)  # discretized cells stacked to full net
column9: Liu et al. 2018 (DARTS derived/eval network). The discretized architecture (CIFAR: 20 cells, C=36). Distinct trace topology from supernet. Self-contained recipe.

column3: ProxylessNAS(net_config='mobile')  # MobileNetV2-like super-net w/ binarized path sampling; ImageNet target
column9: Cai/Zhu/Han 2019 (ProxylessNAS). Hardware-aware NAS on target task directly; path binarization over MBConv search space. Self-contained recipe.

column3: ENASChild(controller_sample, layers=12)  # weight-sharing child net sampled from RNN controller
column9: Pham et al. 2018 (Efficient NAS via parameter sharing). Weight-sharing child networks sampled by an RNN controller. Self-contained recipe (a sampled child).

column3: OFAMobileNetV3(ks=[3,5,7], depth=[2,3,4], expand=[3,4,6])  # elastic supernet (subnet sampling)
column9: Cai et al. 2020 (Once-for-All: train one network, specialize). Elastic-everything supernet; sample sub-networks w/o retraining. Self-contained recipe.

column3: AmoebaNet(C=128, layers=18, genotype='amoebanet_a')  # evolved NASNet-style cell stack
column9: Real et al. 2019 (Regularized Evolution / AmoebaNet). Evolutionary-search-derived cell architecture (NASNet search space). Not in master_catalog. Self-contained recipe.

column3: SinglePathOneShot(blocks=20, choices=4)  # single-path uniform-sampling supernet (choice blocks)
column9: Guo et al. 2020 (Single Path One-Shot NAS). Uniform single-path block sampling; ShuffleNet-based choice blocks. Self-contained recipe.

column3: MAMLConvNet(nway=5, channels=64)  # 4-conv backbone meta-trained w/ inner-loop adaptation (the base learner)
column9: Finn/Abbeel/Levine 2017 (Model-Agnostic Meta-Learning). Standard 4-block conv base learner (miniImageNet 5-way). The net (not the meta-optimizer) is the trace target. Self-contained recipe.

column3: ProtoNet(channels=64, embed=1600)  # 4-conv embedding net; class prototypes = mean support embeddings
column9: Snell/Swersky/Zemel 2017 (Prototypical Networks). Metric-based few-shot: embed then nearest-prototype. 4-conv embedder is the net. Self-contained recipe.

column3: MatchingNet(channels=64, fce=True)  # conv embedder + optional FCE (BiLSTM) + attention over support set
column9: Vinyals et al. 2016 (Matching Networks for One Shot Learning). Attention-kernel few-shot classifier; full-context-embedding option. Self-contained recipe.

column3: RelationNet(channels=64)  # conv embedder + conv relation module scoring query-support pairs
column9: Sung et al. 2018 (Learning to Compare: Relation Network). Learnable deep metric (relation module) for few-shot. Self-contained recipe.

column3: SiameseNet(backbone='conv4')  # twin shared-weight encoders + L1/contrastive distance head
column9: Koch/Zemel/Salakhutdinov 2015 (Siamese Nets for one-shot, Omniglot). Twin shared-weight CNNs; verification distance. Two-image input. Self-contained recipe.

column3: TripletNet(backbone='conv4', embed=128)  # shared encoder over (anchor, pos, neg); triplet-margin
column9: Hoffer & Ailon 2015 / FaceNet (Schroff 2015) triplet networks. Three-tower shared-weight embedding for metric learning. Self-contained recipe.

column3: TransH(n_entities=14541, n_relations=237, dim=200)  # project entities to relation-specific hyperplane then translate
column9: Wang et al. 2014 (TransH). Relation hyperplane projection (handles 1-N/N-N). Triple-id input. Self-contained recipe.

column3: TransR(n_entities=14541, n_relations=237, e_dim=200, r_dim=200)  # relation-specific projection matrix then translate
column9: Lin et al. 2015 (TransR). Separate entity/relation spaces w/ projection matrix per relation. Self-contained recipe.

column3: ConvE(n_entities=14541, n_relations=237, dim=200)  # reshape h,r to 2D -> conv -> project -> score over all entities
column9: Dettmers et al. 2018 (ConvE). 2D-conv over reshaped entity/relation embeddings. Inputs (head id, relation id). Self-contained recipe.

column3: RESCAL(n_entities=14541, n_relations=237, dim=100)  # score = h^T M_r t (full relation matrix bilinear)
column9: Nickel et al. 2011 (RESCAL, three-way tensor factorization). Full bilinear relation matrix. The KGE progenitor. Self-contained recipe.

column3: SimplE(n_entities=14541, n_relations=237, dim=200)  # two embeddings/entity + inverse relations; avg bilinear
column9: Kazemi & Poole 2018 (SimplE). Enhances CP decomposition w/ inverse relations for dependent embeddings. Self-contained recipe.

column3: TabNet(input_dim=54, output_dim=10, n_d=64, n_a=64, n_steps=5)  # sequential attentive feature-selection (sparsemax masks)
column9: Arik & Pfister 2020 (TabNet). Sequential attention selecting features per decision step (sparsemax). Tabular feature-vector input. Self-contained recipe; ref: dreamquark-ai/tabnet.

column3: FTTransformer(n_num=20, cat_cardinalities=[10,5,3], d_token=192, depth=3)  # feature tokenizer + Transformer + CLS
column9: Gorishniy et al. 2021 (Revisiting Deep Learning for Tabular / FT-Transformer). Tokenize num+cat features -> Transformer -> CLS head. Inputs (numeric, categorical-ids). Self-contained recipe.

column3: TabTransformer(cat_cardinalities=[10,5,3], n_num=20, dim=32, depth=6)  # Transformer over categorical embeddings + concat numeric
column9: Huang et al. 2020 (TabTransformer). Contextual categorical embeddings via Transformer; numerics concatenated downstream. Self-contained recipe.

column3: SAINT(n_features=30, dim=32, depth=6)  # self-attention (over features) + intersample attention (over rows)
column9: Somepalli et al. 2021 (SAINT). Hybrid row+column attention w/ contrastive pretraining. Tabular feature input. Self-contained recipe.

column3: NODE(in_features=54, num_trees=2048, depth=6, layers=2)  # neural oblivious decision ensembles (entmax soft splits)
column9: Popov et al. 2020 (Neural Oblivious Decision Ensembles). Differentiable oblivious decision trees (entmax). Self-contained recipe.

column3: TabResNet(in_features=54, dim=256, blocks=3, nclass=10)  # MLP-ResNet (BN + skip) tabular baseline
column9: Gorishniy et al. 2021 (ResNet tabular baseline). Strong simple MLP-residual baseline from FT-Transformer paper. Self-contained recipe.

column3: WideAndDeep(wide_dim=1000, deep_field_dims=[100]*13, embed=16)  # linear wide + MLP deep, joint head
column9: Cheng et al. 2016 (Wide & Deep Learning, Google Play). Memorization (wide linear) + generalization (deep MLP). Two inputs. Foundational deep-recsys. Self-contained recipe.

column3: NeuMF(n_users=6040, n_items=3706, mf_dim=8, mlp_dims=[64,32,16])  # GMF + MLP towers, concat -> sigmoid
column9: He et al. 2017 (Neural Collaborative Filtering / NeuMF). Generalized MF + MLP fusion for implicit feedback. Inputs (user id, item id). Self-contained recipe.

column3: LINE(n_nodes=10000, embed=128, order=2)  # 1st+2nd order proximity node embeddings
column9: Tang et al. 2015 (LINE: Large-scale Information Network Embedding). First/second-order proximity. Node-pair id input. Self-contained recipe.

Dong et al. 2014 (SRCNN, image super-resolution). The FIRST deep-learning SR net (3 conv layers). Foundational low-level-vision milestone (predates H5's ESRGAN-era). Self-contained recipe.

column3: VDSR(depth=20, nc=1)  # 20-layer VGG-style residual super-resolution (global skip)
column9: Kim et al. 2016 (Very Deep SR / VDSR). Deep residual SR (predicts residual). Early SR milestone. Self-contained recipe.

column3: FSRCNN(scale=3, nc=1)  # compact SR: feature extract -> shrink -> map -> expand -> deconv upsample
column9: Dong et al. 2016 (Fast SRCNN / FSRCNN). Operates on LR directly w/ learned deconv upsampling. Self-contained recipe.

column3: DnCNN(depth=17, nc=1)  # 17-layer conv+BN residual denoiser (predicts noise)
column9: Zhang et al. 2017 (DnCNN, Gaussian denoiser). Residual-learning + BN denoising milestone (predates H5 NAFNet-era). Self-contained recipe.

column3: UNetOriginal(nc=1, nclass=2)  # symmetric contracting/expanding path + skip concatenations
column9: Ronneberger/Fischer/Brox 2015 (U-Net). The canonical biomedical segmentation encoder-decoder w/ skips. Original 572 valid-conv input. Foundational segmentation. Self-contained recipe.

column3: FCN8s(nclass=21)  # VGG16 fully-convolutionalized + deconv upsampling + skip fusion (8s)
column9: Long/Shelhamer/Darrell 2015 (Fully Convolutional Networks for Semantic Segmentation). The FCN-8s origin (torchvision fcn is resnet-based; this is the VGG-FCN milestone). Self-contained recipe.

column3: WaveNet(layers=10, blocks=4, channels=64)  # dilated causal conv stack + gated activations + skips (raw audio AR)
column9: van den Oord et al. 2016 (WaveNet). Dilated causal convolution autoregressive raw-audio generator. Foundational audio gen + dilated-conv milestone. Self-contained recipe.

column3: MemNN(vocab=1000, embed=64, hops=3)  # end-to-end memory network: query attends over memory slots (multi-hop)
column9: Sukhbaatar et al. 2015 (End-To-End Memory Networks). Multi-hop attention over memory (bAbI QA). Inputs (story sentences ids, query ids). Attention-mechanism milestone. Self-contained recipe.

NEW family. Reference-free permutation-equivariant feed-forward 3D: predicts affine-invariant cameras + scale-invariant per-view pointmaps with NO privileged anchor view (symmetric under permuting the N-view axis). arXiv:2507.13347, ICLR 2026. Distinct from MVSNet (cost-volume) and MoGe (monocular) already in master; HIGH confidence

NEW family (DUSt3R/MASt3R/Spann3R/Fast3R/VGGT lineage). Two-view ViT regresses dense per-pixel 3D pointmaps in a shared frame with NO camera intrinsics/poses; reframes SfM/MVS as direct pointmap regression. arXiv:2312.14132 / MASt3R arXiv:2406.09756. Master has only MVSNet-class + MoGe -- this paradigm is absent; HIGH confidence

NEW family. Single causal trunk denoises a sequence where EVERY token/frame carries its OWN independent noise level -> fuses next-token AR causality with full-sequence diffusion (noise-as-masking is structural). arXiv:2407.01392; DFoT arXiv:2502.06764 ICML 2025. Distinct from DiT (single shared timestep); Self/Rolling/Causal/Next Forcing are training variants of THIS trunk; HIGH confidence

NEW paradigm (Kaiming He group). Learns a pushforward map that EVOLVES the model distribution during TRAINING via a drifting field V (vanishes at data-match equilibrium); single-pass inference, NO SDE/ODE/score/flow formulation. arXiv:2602.04770 (Feb 2026), 1-NFE FID 1.54. Distinct from diffusion/flow-matching/consistency; HIGH-MED confidence

NEW family. Discrete-time continuous-state generation as Markov transitions, each transition kernel implemented by a SECOND nested generative model producing expressive non-deterministic kernels. arXiv:2506.23589; DTM follow-up 2512.12465. Nested-generator-per-step is the novelty; borderline meta-framework; MED confidence

NEW family. Decoder-only AR transformer where a normalizing flow ("jet") is JOINTLY trained end-to-end as the image (de)tokenizer -- no pretrained VQ/VAE. arXiv:2411.19722, ICLR 2025. Distinct from raster-AR (frozen VQ), Transfusion (diffusion head), and standalone STARFlow; MED confidence

NEW family. Two-stage sparse-voxel 3D-native generator: stage-1 rectified-flow transformer predicts active-voxel structure, stage-2 sparse flow transformer generates per-active-voxel structured latents (SLAT), decodable to NeRF/3DGS/mesh. arXiv:2412.01506. Distinct from dense DiT and 3DGS/NeRF optimizers; MED confidence

Autoregressive image generation WITHOUT vector quantization: per-token continuous latent predicted by a small per-token DIFFUSION head (diffusion loss replaces categorical softmax), masked-AR order. arXiv:2406.11838 NeurIPS'24 (Li/He). Distinct from VQ-raster-AR, MaskGIT (still discrete tokens), and DiT (full-image diffusion); HIGH

PROMINENT-BUT-MISSING. Binds SIX modalities (image, text, audio, depth, thermal, IMU) into one embedding space using ONLY image-paired contrastive data -- emergent cross-modal alignment without all-pairs supervision. arXiv:2305.05665 CVPR'23. Distinct from CLIP (2-modality) and from per-pair multimodal trunks; MED-HIGH

column9: ABSENT (grep coca/contrastive-captioner = 0; only old Show-and-Tell captioner present). Single image-text foundation model trained jointly with a CONTRASTIVE loss (CLS pooling) AND a generative CAPTIONING loss (cross-attn decoder) in one forward -- splits unimodal/multimodal decoder stacks. arXiv:2205.01917. Distinct from CLIP (contrastive-only) and BLIP (separate stages); MED

column3: from audiolm_pytorch import AudioLM, SemanticTransformer, CoarseTransformer, FineTransformer
column9: ABSENT (grep audiolm = 0; VALL-E/MusicGen/EnCodec present but two-stage semantic->acoustic hierarchy is not). Cascade of token-LMs: stage-1 models w2v-BERT SEMANTIC tokens, stage-2/3 condition on them to model SoundStream ACOUSTIC tokens -> long-term-coherent audio continuation. arXiv:2209.03143. Distinct hierarchical-token design; MED

ABSENT (grep diffusiondet/denoising-detect = 0). Object detection reframed as a generative DENOISING diffusion process: random noisy boxes are iteratively refined to ground-truth boxes by a detection decoder; supports dynamic box count + iterative refinement at inference. arXiv:2211.09788 CVPR'23. Distinct from DETR (set-prediction), Sparse-RCNN (learned proposals); MED

ABSENT (grep diffdock = 0; Equiformer/NequIP/DiffuserActor present but pose-docking diffusion is not). Diffusion generative model over the SE(3) product manifold of ligand pose (translation x rotation x torsion) using SE(3)-equivariant tensor-product score network -> blind molecular docking as sampling, not regression. arXiv:2210.01776 ICLR'23. MED

ABSENT (grep brainlm = 0). Masked-autoencoder Transformer foundation model over resting-state/task fMRI recordings (parcel x time tokens) -- "BERT for brain activity"; predicts masked spatiotemporal brain signal, transfers to clinical/cognitive decoding. ICLR'24. Distinct neuro-domain trunk from CORnet/BrainScore vision encoders; MED

ABSENT (grep large-concept = 0). Language modeling ABOVE the token level: predicts the NEXT SENTENCE as a 1024-d SONAR embedding via a diffusion/regression head, decoded back to text by a frozen SONAR decoder -- reasoning operates on language-agnostic 'concepts' not tokens. arXiv:2412.08821 (Meta, Dec 2024). Distinct from token-AR LLM and from token-diffusion (LLaDA); MED

ABSENT (grep replknet = 0; RepMLP present but is reparam-MLP, VAN/SegNeXt use large-kernel-ATTENTION not plain conv). Pure ConvNet built from very-large depthwise kernels (31x31, later SLaK 51x51) with structural reparameterization, reviving large-kernel design to rival ViT ERF. arXiv:2203.06717 CVPR'22. Distinct large-kernel-conv lineage; LOW-MED

VERIFIED. ESM-2 8M config. Token ids must be in [4,32] (avoid special); rotary pos emb; token_dropout=False needed to avoid mask-token-dependent path. Encoder-only BERT-style.
ESM-2 35M. Same recipe family as 8M, larger dims.
ESM-2 150M.
ESM-2 650M flagship size. Larger; trace fine weight-free.
ESM-2 with MLM head (lm_head). Same input as encoder.
Per-residue classification head (e.g. secondary structure).
ESM-1b: absolute pos emb, emb_layer_norm_before=True, token_dropout=True (set ids!=mask). Distinct path from ESM-2.

ESMFold = ESM-2 trunk + folding head (Evoformer-lite + structure module). EsmForProteinFolding present in transformers. HEAVY folding trunk; instantiate with tiny esmfold_config or expect large graph. Outputs 3D coords. Dynamic recycling loop.
ProtT5 (Rostlab). T5 encoder over amino acids. Use T5EncoderModel (encoder-only is the standard PLM usage).
Ankh protein LM = T5 encoder, gated-gelu. ElnaggarLab.

Geometric Vector Perceptron GNN (rotation-equivariant, scalar+vector channels). Input = protein backbone graph (node scalar/vector feats, edge feats). pip install from drorlab/gvp-pytorch. Custom tuple node features (s,V).
VERIFIED. DimeNet++ (faster bilinear->Hadamard). Same input signature.
VERIFIED. Attentive message passing for molecular property pred. forward(x,edge_index,edge_attr,batch). GRU readout.
Differentiable Duvenaud neural molecular fingerprint. forward(x,edge_index,batch).
SE(3)/E(3)-equivariant graph attention transformer (e3nn irreps, MLP attention). Reference impl atomicarchitects/equiformer; needs e3nn. Higher-degree tensor features. NOT pip-trivial (clone + e3nn).
MACE: higher-order equivariant MPNN interatomic potential (ACE + equivariant messages). pip install ./mace (clone). Needs e3nn. Many radial/irreps hyperparams. SOTA force field.
NequIP E(3)-equivariant interatomic potential (tensor-field network style). pip install nequip; needs e3nn. Config-driven.
Allegro: strictly-local equivariant potential (no message passing, local descriptors). Extends NequIP. Needs e3nn + nequip.
PaiNN equivariant message passing (scalar+vector). In schnetpack (pip install schnetpack). Not installed here.
TorchMD-NET equivariant transformer (ET). pip install torchmd-net. Attention-based equivariant potential.

Graphormer (graph transformer w/ centrality+spatial+edge encodings). In older transformers; check GraphormerConfig present. Custom collated graph input (in_degree,out_degree,spatial_pos,attn_bias). Won OGB-LSC PCQM4M.
PointNet classification (T-Net spatial transformer + shared MLP + max-pool). Input (B,3,N). Reference fxia22/pointnet.pytorch or yanx27 repo. Pure MLP, permutation-invariant.
PointNet++ single-scale grouping (set abstraction layers, FPS+ball query). Input (B,3,N). Hierarchical. yanx27 repo canonical.
PointNet++ multi-scale grouping. Multiple radii per SA layer. Input (B,3,N).
Dynamic Graph CNN (EdgeConv, kNN recomputed per layer). Input (B,3,N). WangYueFt/dgcnn or learning3d. Dynamic kNN graph = dynamic control flow.
VERIFIED (DGCNN building block). PyG-native DynamicEdgeConv = the DGCNN core layer. Recomputes kNN graph each forward (dynamic). forward(x,batch).
PyG-native PointNet++ set-abstraction conv (PointNetConv). Build with fps+radius graph. Reference building block.
Point Transformer (vector self-attention on local neighborhoods). PyG has PointTransformerConv layer too. SOTA on S3DIS/ModelNet.
PointMLP (pure residual MLP + geometric affine, no sophisticated local extractors). Input (B,3,N).
PointNeXt: improved PointNet++ training+scaling (inverted residual MLP). Uses openpoints framework.
PTv3: serialization-based (space-filling curve) point transformer, current SOTA. Dict input (coord, feat, offset/grid). flash-attn optional.
VERIFIED. 1D Fourier Neural Operator (Burgers etc.). Spectral conv (FFT->linear->iFFT). in_channels includes coord grid channel.
VERIFIED. 2D FNO (Darcy flow / Navier-Stokes). 2D spectral conv. in_channels=field+coords.
VERIFIED. Generic-dim FNO from neuralop.models. n_modes tuple sets dim.
VERIFIED. Tensorized FNO (Tucker/CP factorized spectral weights). Fewer params.
VERIFIED. Spherical FNO (spherical harmonic transform). Used in weather (FourCastNet-style). Input on lat-lon grid.
VERIFIED family (U-shaped Neural Operator, multi-resolution). Encoder-decoder FNO with up/downsampling.
Graph-Informed Neural Operator (GNO encoder/decoder + FNO latent). For irregular geometries. Complex multi-input.
DeepONet (branch net over sensor values + trunk net over query coords, dot-product). pip install DeepXDE (PyTorch backend). Two-input operator net.

column9: Vanilla PINN = plain tanh MLP; physics enters via autograd PDE residual loss. Input = (x,t) collocation coords. DeepXDE FNN / or hand-rolled nn.Sequential.
Parallel FNN PINN (independent subnetworks per output). DeepXDE.
NVIDIA PhysicsNeMo (formerly Modulus) FNO/AFNO/etc. pip install nvidia-physicsnemo. Large SciML model zoo (alt source for FNO/GNN/transolver).

ProbSparse attention long-sequence forecaster. Multi-input: past_values,past_time_features,past_observed_mask,future_time_features (+future_values for training). Distilling conv between encoder layers.
Decomposition + Auto-Correlation (FFT-based) forecaster. Same multi-input contract as Informer. Series decomp blocks.
Vanilla probabilistic encoder-decoder transformer for TS (HF baseline). Multi-input contract like Informer.
VERIFIED. Patching + channel-independent transformer. Input past_values (B,L,C). Use PatchTSTForPrediction for forecasting head.
PatchTST classification head variant.
VERIFIED. All-MLP (TSMixer) patch model: time-mixing + feature-mixing MLPs. Input (B,L,C).
Google TimesFM decoder-only TS foundation model in HF. Patch tokens, decoder-only. Check TimesFmConfig defaults; foundation-model sized.
Temporal 2D-variation (FFT period detect -> reshape to 2D -> Inception conv). thuml/Time-Series-Library. configs namespace object. Reshape control flow per detected period.
Inverted Transformer: attention over variate tokens (each series = a token). ICLR 2024. thuml TSLib or pip neuralforecast.
TimeXer: endogenous patch tokens + exogenous variate tokens. NeurIPS 2024. Also in pytorch-forecasting + neuralforecast.
DLinear: series decomp (trend/seasonal) + 2 linear layers. Strong simple baseline ('Are Transformers Effective?'). Tiny.
NLinear: subtract last value, single linear, add back. Distribution-shift robust baseline.
Frequency Enhanced Decomposed Transformer (random Fourier mode selection + decomp). thuml TSLib has it too.
VERIFIED-recipe (pip install pytorch-tsmixer). Google all-MLP TSMixer (time+feature mixing). Distinct from PatchTSMixer.
Multiscale mixing (decompose to multiple scales, mix). ICLR 2024. In thuml TSLib.
N-BEATS: deep stack of fully-connected basis-expansion blocks (trend/seasonality), doubly-residual. Pure MLP, interpretable.
N-HiTS: multi-rate sampling + hierarchical interpolation N-BEATS successor. neuralforecast.
Temporal Fusion Transformer (variable selection nets, LSTM encoder, interpretable multi-head attn, static covariates). Complex multi-input.
DeepAR autoregressive RNN probabilistic forecaster (Amazon). LSTM + likelihood head.
DLRM: bottom MLP over dense feats + embedding tables over sparse feats + pairwise dot interaction + top MLP. Multi-input (dense tensor + list of sparse index tensors). EmbeddingBag.
DeepFM: FM (2nd-order) + deep MLP sharing embeddings. DeepCTR-Torch needs feature_columns spec (SparseFeat/DenseFeat). pip install deepctr-torch.
Deep & Cross Network (explicit feature crossing via cross layers + deep net).
DCN-V2 / DCN-Mix (low-rank mixture cross network).
xDeepFM: Compressed Interaction Network (vector-wise explicit interactions) + DNN.
AutoInt: multi-head self-attention over feature embeddings for automatic interaction.
Wide & Deep (Google): wide linear + deep MLP.
Neural Factorization Machine (bi-interaction pooling + DNN).
Attentional Factorization Machine (attention over 2nd-order interactions).
FiBiNET: SENet feature importance + bilinear interaction.
Neural Graph Collaborative Filtering (embedding propagation on user-item bipartite graph). Predecessor of LightGCN.
Self-Attentive Sequential Recommendation (causal transformer over item sequence). Session/sequence rec.
Deep Interest Network (attention over user behavior history w.r.t. candidate item).

HyenaDNA: Hyena operator (implicit long conv via FFT), single-nucleotide, up to 1M context, sub-quadratic. trust_remote_code. No HF-native config; custom modeling file. Weight-free instantiate via its config class.
Caduceus: bi-directional reverse-complement-equivariant Mamba (BiMamba) for DNA. trust_remote_code. Needs mamba_ssm (installed!). Long context.
DNABERT-2: BPE tokenization + ALiBi BERT encoder over DNA. trust_remote_code (custom Bert variant w/ flash-attn fallback).
Nucleotide Transformer (InstaDeep): encoder over 6-mer DNA tokens; HF uses ESM arch class. Weight-free via EsmConfig with k-mer vocab.
Enformer: conv tower + transformer for gene expression from 200kb DNA (one-hot 4ch). pip install enformer-pytorch (lucidrains). Long input; large.
Borzoi: Enformer-style conv+attention+U-net for RNA-seq coverage, 524kb input. PyTorch port johahi/borzoi-pytorch. Very long input.
scGPT: transformer over (gene token, expression value) pairs; flash-attn. Single-cell foundation model. Multi-input (gene ids + binned values + masks).
Geneformer: BERT over rank-ordered gene tokens (rank-value encoding of a cell). HF BERT arch. ctheodoris/Geneformer.
scBERT: Performer (linear attention) over gene expression for cell-type annotation.
ESM3 (open small): multimodal generative PLM over sequence+structure+function tracks. pip install esm (evolutionaryscale). Multi-track tokenized input. Large.
ESM Cambrian (ESMC): newer encoder PLM family (300M/600M/6B). pip install esm.

Boltz-1 (MIT, open AlphaFold3-class): diffusion structure module + MSA/pairformer trunk. pip install boltz. Predicts protein/NA/ligand complexes. NOT a clean single forward; recycling + diffusion sampling loops. Trace as components.
Chai-1 (Apache-2.0, AF3-class): pairformer + diffusion. pip install chai_lab. Multi-input (MSA/template/ligand). Loop-heavy like Boltz.

OpenFold: PyTorch reproduction of AlphaFold2 (Evoformer + structure module + recycling). pip from aqlaboratory/openfold (custom CUDA kernels optional). Huge feature dict input; recycling loop. Trace submodules (Evoformer block, IPA).
OpenFold3 (Oct 2025 preview): open AF3-class (proteins+NA+ligands), diffusion. PyTorch, NVIDIA NIM. Diffusion + pairformer; loop-heavy.
ProteinMPNN inverse folding (message-passing over backbone graph, autoregressive decode). Widely used for protein design. forward over backbone coords + masks.
RFdiffusion: SE(3) diffusion on RoseTTAFold backbone for de-novo design. Diffusion sampling loop; SE3Transformer (e3nn/dgl). Trace SE3 block.
Uni-Mol: SE(3) transformer over 3D molecular conformers (atom + pair representations, coordinate head). Needs unicore.
ChemBERTa: RoBERTa over SMILES strings (DeepChem/seyonec). Molecular property prediction. HF RoBERTa arch.
IBM MoLFormer-XL: linear-attention transformer over SMILES w/ rotary. trust_remote_code.
MEGNet: graph network for materials/molecules with global state. matgl has PyTorch (M3GNet/MEGNet/CHGNet).
M3GNet: 3-body materials interatomic potential (graph + 3-body angular). pip install matgl. Periodic crystal graphs.
CHGNet: crystal Hamiltonian GNN universal potential w/ magnetic moments. pip install chgnet.
Crystal Graph Conv Net (materials property from crystal graph). Foundational materials GNN.
POD-DeepONet (POD basis as trunk). DeepXDE variant.
GraphCast weather GNN (icosahedral mesh, encode-process-decode). NOTE: official is JAX/Haiku not PyTorch; PyTorch ports exist (e.g. in PhysicsNeMo). Flag for synthesizer.
Spherical CNN (SO(3)-equivariant conv via spherical harmonics). For molecular/cosmology/360-image. s2cnn pkg.
SE(3)-Transformer (equivariant attention, irreps). Used in RFdiffusion. Needs DGL + e3nn. 3D point/graph input.
